response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing real-time credit/liquidity systems — key requirements for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and ship complex distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time microservices)
Strong engineering culture advocacy through workshops, TDD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No demonstrated leadership of engineering teams larger than 10 people or experience building senior technical leadership layers
Lacks explicit experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk modeling, or regulated AI deployment
No evidence of designing event-driven multi-agent architectures with stateful reasoning over financial data
